The Person Behind the Posts

I don't just post —
I build presence.

I am Mehak — a 20-year-old social media manager and content creator based in Delhi. I have been running Instagram campaigns, leading content teams, and building brand identities for the things I care about since my first year of college.

I co-founded Karn Foundation and grew its entire digital presence from scratch — every caption, every reel concept, every post. I led all campaigns and social media for Eartha, Dyal Singh College's Environment Society, directing a peer team and managing content across platforms.

I am also a personal content creator on Instagram — I make reels, storytelling videos, and posts that reflect a real voice and connect with real people. I know what performs, I know what feels authentic, and I know the difference between the two.

📸Personal Instagram creator — reels, storytelling, lifestyle content
📢Built & ran social media for Karn Foundation from 0
🌱Campaign head for Eartha — multi-platform, peer team, consistent brand voice
✍️Every caption I write sounds like a person, not a brand template
What I Do

The work that actually matters.

Social Media

End-to-End Account Management

From content calendar to posting to community engagement — I manage the full cycle. I have done this for Karn Foundation and Eartha, building consistent brand presence across platforms.

Content Creation

Reels, Videos & Storytelling Posts

I create short-form video content — reels, storytelling posts, trend-based content — that connects with audiences instead of just filling a feed. I am comfortable in front of the camera and behind the edit.

Campaign Strategy

Campaign Planning & Execution

I have planned and led multi-platform awareness campaigns — from ideation to messaging to coordinating a team. For Eartha, I directed the full content strategy and delivery across environmental campaigns.

Campaign Strategy Team Lead Messaging Multi-platform
✍️
Copywriting

Captions, Copy & Brand Voice

I write captions that get saved and shared — not skimmed. My copy has a distinct tone: direct, warm, and human. I have built brand voices from scratch and maintained them consistently under pressure.

Caption Writing Brand Voice Awareness Copy Social Copy
🌱
Community Building

Building Audiences Around Causes

Through Karn Foundation, I built a community around a cause — not a product. Organic growth through purposeful content, genuine voice, and volunteer communication that actually reads like a human wrote it.

Organic Growth NGO / Social Impact Audience Building

AI-Assisted Workflow

AI Tools for Smarter Content

Experience

Where I have actually done this.

2024 – Present
Campaigning Head & Social Media Manager
EARTHA — Environment Society, Dyal Singh College
  • Led end-to-end content strategy and campaign execution for environmental awareness drives across Instagram and digital platforms.
  • Directed a peer content team — coordinated messaging, maintained consistent brand voice, ensured on-time delivery.
  • Created reels, carousels, and caption copy that drove real engagement and expanded the society's digital reach.
  • Managed the full campaign calendar: ideation → content creation → posting → performance review.
📢 Campaign Strategy 🎥 Content Creation 👥 Team Lead
2023 – Present
Co-Founder & Social Media Lead
KARN FOUNDATION
  • Co-founded a grassroots community welfare initiative and built its brand voice and full social media identity from zero.
  • Managed all Instagram content — ideation, creation, scheduling, and community engagement.
  • Grew the foundation's online presence organically through consistent, purpose-driven storytelling content.
  • Handled end-to-end volunteer communication and maintained the initiative's digital voice across all touchpoints.
📸 Instagram Growth 🌱 Brand from Scratch ✍️ Copywriting
2024 – Present
Content Team Member
ENACTUS — Dyal Singh College
  • Created social media copy and storytelling posts for community development projects.
  • Translated project impact into accessible, audience-first narratives for student and public channels.
📝 Social Copy 💡 Storytelling
